instrument: qc-tier1-mechanical.py for deterministic checks; cheap judge tier for checks 12, 13, 14 (never the writer model)

5_title_placement.note: the word Title never precedes the title; title lives in metadata and is not announced with a label in the script

6_speakable_characters_only.note: zero numerals; all numbers, symbols, and units written as spoken

7_tag_syntax_integrity.note: square-bracket S2.1 Pro syntax, balanced, no orphaned or malformed brackets

8_tag_count_exclusion.note: word and character counts recomputed with tags stripped

10_forbidden_names.note: none of the four style reference speakers, their books, or talks appear; no real person named

11_forbidden_word_by_style.note: the word paradox is absent (Counter Intuitive)

12_no_fabrication.note: no invented study, statistic, institution, or biography; all content traces to supplied stories

13_mode_perspective.note: host first person, guest third person by name with the epic guest introduction present, no slippage

14_pronoun_correctness.note: every reference to the guest matches they/them; nothing guessed or defaulted

15_pure_deliverable.note: delivery/episode-script.txt contains the episode and nothing else

16_no_intake_contamination.note: no contact details, consent language, or the cover visual description appear in the script
